name: DaCheng HangSeng Idx(QDII-LOF)
summary: DaCheng HangSeng Idx(QDII-LOF) is a fund that invests in companies listed on the Hong Kong Hang Seng Index, providing investors with exposure to the Hong Kong stock market. It operates as a Qualified Domestic Institutional Investor (QDII) Listed Open-Ended Fund (LOF), allowing mainland Chinese investors to invest in Hong Kong equities. It is managed by Dacheng Fund Management Co., Ltd., based in China.
